subcodes.first_line: O noble branch of the blessed Tree! The hearts of the ardent seekers are drawn and attracted at every hour [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الجلیل من السدره المبارکه قلب مشتاقان طالب و مائل که در هر ساعتی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @prayer for spiritual recognition
